posts.author: alessandra (Alessandra)
posts.cookedHtml:
Join the monday Developer Success team to ask questions and discuss the API and apps framework!

You can bring any questions you’d like –– including questions about the API and developer tools, our marketplace review process and best practices when designing your app.

Date & Time:
02:00pm - Thursday, October 27, 2022 (Eastern Time - US & Canada).

Where:
Join us on Zoom

See you there
